data.title: Symmetry Laser acquires ArcRev to expand precision laser cutting capabilities for the medical device industry.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Davis, California, Symmetry Laser, a key player in offering precise laser cutting solutions for the medical device sector, disclosed the finalization of its acquisition of ArcRev. This particular company is recognized for its technical knowledge and efficient operations.

data.title: Progressive CFO John Sauerland to retire on July 3, 2026, per Globe Newswire update.
data.description: In Mayfield Village, Ohio, as of January 28, 2026, The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) disclosed that John Sauerland, the current Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the company, is set to retire on July 3, 2026.

data.title: Obagi Medical partners with Next Health for ALOHA Program to gather real-world evidence for Obagi's MagIQ.
data.description: Next Health has been chosen as a top partner in wellness and longevity due to its unique strategy in personalized aesthetics and health optimization. This decision comes in light of the company's innovative approach, which has garnered significant attention within the industry. With a focus on tailoring services to individual needs, Next Health has set itself apart from competitors. By prioritizing a personalized experience, they have successfully positioned themselves as a leader in the field. This achievement reflects the company's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions for optimal health and wellness.

data.title: Saber partners with Circle Payments Network to enhance global off-ramp capabilities, benefiting from CPN as a BFI.
data.description: In San Francisco, Saber revealed its collaboration with Circle Payments Network (CPN) as a Beneficiary Financial Institution (BFI).

data.title: Ten Eleven Ventures appoints Grace Cassy as Partner to focus on seed and early-stage security investments, reflecting firm’s expansion momentum.
data.description: BURLINGAME, Calif.-- Ten Eleven Ventures, a cyber-focused global venture capital firm, has welcomed Grace Cassy as Partner, alongside several partner and leadership promotions. Cassy will prioritize seed and early-stage security investments, particularly in Israel, and resilience and defense tech investments. The firm is expanding globally and enhancing its investment activities.

data.title: Skin Boosters Market expected to reach USD 3,263.80 Million by 2032, with a projected CAGR of 11.58%.
data.description: In Pune, India, as of January 28, 2026, the Global Skin Boosters Market, with a value of USD 1492.17 million in 2025, is anticipated to surge to USD 3,263.80 million by 2032, exhibiting a remarkable CAGR of 11.58%. The market report highlights key trends and insights, particularly in the realm of Injectable Skin procedures.

data.title: Salt Lake City named most neighborly city of 2026 by Redfin, boasting high community involvement and affordable homes.
data.description: In a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage powered by Rocket, Salt Lake City has been identified as the most neighborly city in the United States this year. Factors such as residents assisting their neighbors, prioritizing volunteering, and a considerable number of affordable homes contributed to the Utah capital topping the list. Redfin examined various aspects for major U.S. cities, including rates of community involvement among citizens. Salt Lake City emerged as the leader in neighborliness with its strong sense of community and affordability in housing options.

data.title: Constructor is the sole vendor selected as Customers' Choice in 2025 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Search.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in San Francisco, Constructor, a top AI-driven search and product discovery platform for enterprise ecommerce firms, revealed its recognition as a Customers' Choice in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Search and Product. This acknowledgment solidifies Constructor's position as a leader in the industry, as validated by the customers themselves. This achievement underscores the impact Constructor has made in delivering exceptional services tailored to the needs of enterprise ecommerce companies.

data.title: Textron Inc. warns of near-term pressure, reports sales of $4.175B & adjusted EPS of $1.73 in Q4 2025. Share repurchases totaled $822M in 2025.
data.description: Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) saw a decline in stock value following a disappointing fiscal 2026 earnings forecast. Their sales rose to $4.175 billion from $3.613 billion in the previous year, surpassing the expected $4.098 billion. The adjusted EPS was $1.73, higher than the anticipated $1.70. Operating cash flow for fiscal 2025 was $1.3 billion, with cash equivalents totaling $1.94 billion as of January 3. Share repurchases in 2025 reached $822 million, including $187 million spent in the fourth quarter alone. Textron Aviation experienced a 36% Y/Y revenue increase to $1.7 billion, driven by a $400 million rise in aircraft revenues and $67 million in aftermarket parts and services. Their backlog reached $7.7 billion. Bell's revenues grew by 11% Y/Y to $1.3 billion.

data.title: Amazon to cut 16,000 jobs, on top of 14,000 layoffs in October. Stock up slightly post-announcement.
data.description: Following the announcement of 16,000 job cuts by Amazon, the tech giant's stock saw a slight increase. This is in addition to the 14,000 layoffs that were previously made in October. The total number of job cuts now stands at 30,000. This move marks the latest mass layoff by the company, reflecting its ongoing restructuring efforts. The news led to a positive response in the stock market as investors reacted to this cost-cutting measure.

data.title: AT&T stock rises on Q4 earnings beat, with solid guidance through 2028. Q4 revenue and earnings exceeded expectations. Wireless adds fell short.
data.description: AT&T's stock saw an increase due to positive guidance for the next three years. While fourth-quarter earnings and revenue surpassed expectations, there was a shortfall in wireless additions. The company's strong financial outlook until 2028 has boosted investor confidence, leading to the rise in stock value.

data.title: Housing Works celebrates 35 years in service and Housing Works Cannabis Co marks 3 years as NY's only 100% charity dispensary.
data.description: A nonprofit organization that emerged during the AIDS crisis has grown to become the United States' leading provider of housing and services for individuals affected by HIV/AIDS. Housing Works, based in New York, is celebrating its 35th anniversary and has established itself as a prominent entity in this field. With a focus on supporting individuals living with HIV/AIDS, the organization has significantly expanded its reach and impact.

data.title: 32 Virginia Cancer Specialists physicians recognized as top doctors for personalized cancer care in 2026 by NorthernVirginia Magazine.
data.description: 32 physicians affiliated with Virginia Cancer Specialists have been recognized as Top Doctors in 2026 by Northern Virginia magazine. The practice, based in Fairfax, Virginia, is the largest private cancer practice in Northern Virginia. These physicians were nominated by their medical peers for this prestigious recognition.

data.title: P.F. Chang's celebrates Year of the Horse with menu, cocktails, and red envelope tradition nationwide Jan 28-Feb 24.
data.description: P.F. Chang's has announced the kick-off of its 2026 Lunar New Year celebration starting January 28 through February 24. The event will be held in Scottsdale, Arizona and will offer immersive experiences for shared celebrations. This limited-time offering is expected to attract nationwide attention.
